resources.string: SOS Alert has been sent to your emergency\ncontacts.
SOS IS ONLY TO BE USED IN\nEMERGENCY AND LIFE\nTHREATENING CONDITIONS

Your location, along with a flash notification, will be sent to your emergency contact numbers along with those within a 50m radius. If any student intentionally sends a false alert through the application, strict disciplinary action will be taken against them. Such actions not only disrupt the system but also compromise the safety and well-being of other users.
Are you sure you want to turn on SOS Alert?
